name: melodio
description: Melodio - Music Player App - MERN Stack Monorepo

scripts.build: bun run build:backend && bun run build:frontend
scripts.clear: rm -rf node_modules && cd backend && rm -rf node_modules dist .env && cd .. && cd frontend && rm -rf __mocks__ coverage dist node_modules .env && cd ..
scripts.test: bun run test:backend && bun run test:vitest
scripts.test:coverage: cd backend && bun run test:coverage && vitest run --project frontend --coverage
scripts.test:task1: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task1/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task1/
scripts.test:task2: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task2/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task2/
scripts.test:task3: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task3/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task3/
scripts.test:task4: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task4/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task4/
scripts.test:task5: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task5/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task5/
scripts.test:task6: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task6/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task6/
scripts.test:task7: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task7/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task7/
scripts.test:task8: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task8/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task8/
scripts.test:task9: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task9/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task9/
scripts.test:task10: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task10/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task10/
scripts.test:task11: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task11/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task11/
scripts.test:task12: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task12/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task12/
scripts.test:task13: cd backend && bun run test -- --testPathPattern=__tests__/task13/ && cd .. && vitest run --project frontend __tests__/task13/
scripts.typecheck:frontend: cd frontend && bunx tsc --noEmit --noUnusedLocals false --noUnusedParameters false
scripts.typecheck:backend: cd backend && bunx tsc --noEmit --declaration false --declarationMap false
scripts.typecheck:strict: bun run typecheck:frontend && bun run typecheck:backend
scripts.check:quality: bun run lint && bun run check:candidate-contract && bun run typecheck
